name: Galliano Barbeque Sauce - Mary Hudgins - Hollywood Park
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat until well combined and heated through.
3. Keep warm as needed for serving.
4. This sauce can be used to enhance hot dogs, hamburgers, spareribs, seafood, fish sticks, and chicken.
From the collection of Clarence Fontish, this recipe is known for its versatility.
